subject: WM-0162 ready for review
body: Resolved MSG-MREN53JS-7E9ED9: ADR-0017 now approves schema-v3 GameSession projection v1 with explicit Init/Ready negotiation, render/UI fields and fail-closed compatibility; WM-0164 exclusively owns exact sim-protocol files/tests; DAG is serial WM-0162->0163->0164->0165->0166 with write width 1; all candidate tasks remain proposed/unclaimed; required checks and JSON/DAG assertions pass; commit 604dad5.
